title: lepidium perfoliatum
intro: Lepidium perfoliatum, also known as cliff breakseed or perennial peppergrass, is a perennial herb native to North America. The medicinal properties of Lepidium perfoliatum include its potential to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Lepidium perfoliatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
